title: Just Cursed
description: This modpack throws normal Minecraft out the window with bizarre blocks, flatten mobs, and just chaos.
body:
# ![Just Cursed](https://i.imgur.com/zFjoSqG.png)
This modpack completely replace your typical Minecraft experience with something extremely cursed. Forget everything you thought and knew about the game. Just Cursed throws normal Minecraft out the window and put you into a world of chaos.

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

✅ Replace the default title screen with this... ([Slyde](https://modrinth.com/mod/slyde), [Not Enough Cursedness](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-cursedness))

![Title screen](https://i.imgur.com/MnsxWiN.gif)

✅ Mojyan cat!!!  ([Nyan Cat Loading](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyan-cat-loading))

![Nyan cat loading screen](https://i.imgur.com/TzycxOQ.png)

✅ 2D Entities ([Flatter Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/flatter-entities))

![2D Entities](https://i.imgur.com/SZbAw6n.png)

✅ Every item edible ([Eat everything](https://modrinth.com/mod/eat-everything))

![Me eating dirt block](https://i.imgur.com/EzFXqns.png)

✅ Just a bit more glow ([Slyde](https://modrinth.com/mod/slyde))

![100x glow enchanted book](https://i.imgur.com/fAiscec.png)

✅ Equip anything ([WearThat](https://modrinth.com/mod/wearthat))

![Me wearing stupid stuff](https://i.imgur.com/CXLR2hY.png)

✅ Cursed Nether ([Flooded Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/flooded-nether))

![The Nether flooded with water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cq5DJMRg/images/45638568f4bae00361bcce835b1181bca214d085.png)

✅ Werid blocks and items ([Not Enough Cursedness](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-cursedness), [Stringer Things](https://modrinth.com/mod/stringer-things),...)

![Werid blocks and items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07886dbd641b9fa8ac0090ba947d48d7347a1b0c.webp)

✅ Everything is extremely slippery ([Everything Infinite Ice](https://modrinth.com/mod/everything-ice))

✅ Built with performance in mind ([Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium),...)

✅ And alot more features ready for you to explore! So what are you waiting for?
</details>
